title: Yachts@'el #3183
definition:
Jahzeel = "God divides"

 1) the 1st of the 4 sons of Naphtali and founder of the family of
    Jahzeelites
nasbUsage:

 1) the 1st of the 4 sons of Naphtali and founder of the family of
    Jahzeelites
